title: WorktreeInfo
description:
Information about a single git worktree.

Returned by worktree create and list operations.

base_branch.description:
The base branch this worktree was created from.
Populated on create and list (from metadata), `None` when metadata is missing.

branch.description: The git branch checked out in this worktree (e.g., `assay/auth-flow`).

is_orphan.description:
Whether this worktree is orphaned (no linked active WorkSession).
Populated by `worktree::list()` when cross-referencing sessions.

path.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory.

spec_slug.description: The spec slug this worktree is associated with.
